-- ==========================================
-- ESTRUTURA DO BANCO ASSETTRACK PRO
-- ==========================================

-- 1. Departamentos e Centros de Custo
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS departments (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    "costCenter" TEXT,
    "createdAt" TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- 2. Colaboradores (Base RH)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS employees (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    "departmentId" TEXT REFERENCES departments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    sector TEXT,
    role TEXT,
    cpf TEXT,
    "isActive" BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE
);

-- 3. Inventário de Ativos
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS assets (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    "departmentId" TEXT REFERENCES departments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    type TEXT NOT NULL,
    brand TEXT,
    model TEXT,
    observations TEXT, -- Metadados Virtuais (RAM, CPU, S/N) codificados aqui
    photos JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'Disponível',
    "assignedTo" TEXT REFERENCES employees(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    "qrCode" TEXT,
    "createdAt" TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    history JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb
);

-- 4. Fluxo de Requisições
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS requests (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    "requesterId" TEXT,
    "employeeId" TEXT REFERENCES employees(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    items JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
    "itemFulfillments" JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
    observation TEXT,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'Pendente',
    "createdAt" TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    type TEXT DEFAULT 'Padrao'
);

-- 5. Central de Notificações (Realtime)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    title TEXT NOT NULL,
    message TEXT,
    type TEXT,
    "createdAt" TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    "targetModule" TEXT,
    "isRead" BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
);

-- 6. Auditoria (Check Semestral)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_sessions (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    sector TEXT NOT NULL,
    "createdAt" TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    entries JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
    "isFinished" BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    "generatedRequestId" TEXT
);

-- 7. Gestão de Usuários e Acessos
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    username TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    password TEXT NOT NULL,
    sector TEXT -- Metadados Virtuais (Módulos e Permissões) codificados aqui
);

-- ==========================================
-- SEGURANÇA E ACESSO (RLS)
-- ==========================================
ALTER TABLE departments ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE employees ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE assets ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE requests ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE notifications ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

-- ============================================================
-- SCRIPT DE INICIALIZAÇÃO - ASSETTRACK PRO (SUPABASE)
-- EXECUTE ESTE BLOCO INTEIRO NO SQL EDITOR DO SUPABASE
-- ============================================================

-- 1. Tabelas Contábeis (Base do Sistema)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accounting_accounts (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    code TEXT NOT NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS accounting_classifications (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    code TEXT NOT NULL,
    "accountId" TEXT REFERENCES accounting_accounts(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS asset_type_configs (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    "classificationId" TEXT REFERENCES accounting_classifications(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

-- 2. Infraestrutura e Departamentos
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS departments (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    "costCenter" TEXT,
    "createdAt" TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- 3. Recursos Humanos
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS employees (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    "departmentId" TEXT REFERENCES departments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    sector TEXT,
    role TEXT,
    cpf TEXT,
    "isActive" BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE
);

-- 4. Inventário e Ativos
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS assets (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    "departmentId" TEXT REFERENCES departments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    type TEXT NOT NULL, 
    brand TEXT,
    model TEXT,
    observations TEXT, -- Armazena dados virtuais (RAM, S/N, etc) via Base64
    photos JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'Disponível',
    "assignedTo" TEXT REFERENCES employees(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    "qrCode" TEXT,
    "createdAt" TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    history JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb
);

-- 5. Operações e Requisições
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS requests (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    "requesterId" TEXT,
    "employeeId" TEXT REFERENCES employees(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    items JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
    "itemFulfillments" JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
    observation TEXT,
    status TEXT DEFAULT 'Pendente',
    "createdAt" TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    type TEXT DEFAULT 'Padrao'
);

-- 6. Auditoria e Notificações
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    title TEXT NOT NULL,
    message TEXT,
    type TEXT,
    "createdAt" TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    "targetModule" TEXT,
    "isRead" BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS audit_sessions (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    sector TEXT NOT NULL,
    "createdAt" TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    entries JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
    "isFinished" BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
    "generatedRequestId" TEXT
);

-- 7. Segurança de Usuários
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    username TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    password TEXT NOT NULL,
    sector TEXT -- Armazena permissões de módulos via Base64
);

-- ==========================================
-- POLÍTICAS DE ACESSO PÚBLICO (DEVELOPMENT)
-- ==========================================
DO $$ 
DECLARE
    t text;
BEGIN
    FOR t IN 
        SELECT table_name 
        FROM information_schema.tables 
        WHERE table_schema = 'public' 
    LOOP
        EXECUTE format('ALTER TABLE public.%I ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;', t);
        EXECUTE format('DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Public Full Access" ON public.%I;', t);
        EXECUTE format('CREATE POLICY "Public Full Access" ON public.%I FOR ALL USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);', t);
    END LOOP;
END $$;

-- ============================================================
-- CORE TABLES - INFRAESTRUTURA PRINCIPAL DO ASSETTRACK PRO

);

    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    "departmentId" TEXT REFERENCES public.departments(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    sector TEXT,
    role TEXT,
    cpf TEXT,
    "isActive" BOOLEAN DEFAULT true
);

-- 3. Ativos (Inventário Principal)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.assets (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,

);

);

-- 6. Gestão de Usuários
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.users (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    username TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
    password TEXT NOT NULL,
    sector TEXT,
    modules JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
    "employeeId" TEXT REFERENCES public.employees(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

-- 7. Sistema de Notificações (Real-time)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.notifications (
    id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    title TEXT NOT NULL,
    message TEXT NOT NULL,
    type TEXT NOT NULL,
    "createdAt" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "targetModule" TEXT,
    "isRead" BOOLEAN DEFAULT false
);
